TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Hashim Tha√ßi = Mntucing hngkawas 1968 idas 4 jiyax 24 ka Hashim Tha√ßi ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Kosovo ta sayang o kiya ka Hashim Tha√ßi, pnaah hngkawas 2016 idas 4 jiyax 7 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. = Hasimi Taci = Hasim Taci (Kari Albania: Hashim Tha√ßi, kari Serbia: HaŇ°im Tańći, kngkawas 1968 idas 4 diyax 24Ôľć), Kosovo seyjicya, brah soto Kosovo, kiya uri u ntumal brah Yugoslavia Kosovo Dukuricu Undo niya. Kiya ka Kosovo dukuricu na Bukung Kosovo Mincu Tang mi sediq Albania dmudul na brah Kosovo Heytay Pnltadan mpdudul niya. Hasim Taci u mniq kngkkawas 1990 pnrdingan u mnuyas Pyasan Tubeyhing Prishtina cida, kiya ka hantay Serbia Congyang Seyhu na cicin laqi muyas. Hasim Taci u mniq kngkawas 1993 tumal mniq Switzerland Zuric na Kosovo llutuc Albania seyji undo, kiya mi pssli Kosovo Hedytay Pnltadan, dmudul spuda biyax mcbu meysa dukuricu Kosovo. Bukuy daw ini dhuq 1 kngkawas ka kcka diyax wada qmlahang tuhunac Serbia hbaraw sediq Albania ka mnou Sng 1/4 dxral niya nniqan. Kngkawas 1997 idas 7, Prishtina cida, Prishtina (Sotu Kosovo saya) tihwang hoying ini dhuq muda pcahu Hasim Taci niqan spngan pnchuwan 10 knkawas, tnyuwan cumi ka 'Muda Dmudul Smicu Cuyi', kiya daw spuda Serbia ka tnpusu Tuhunac Ryeynmong heytay mi keysacu muru pnrngawan knkana lnlingay qnlhangan qm raq Hasim Taci. Babaw niya daw Hasim Taci dmudul Kosowo Heytay Pnltada tnumal kngkawas 1999 na Mccbu Kosovo. Mnhdu mccbu daw UN u snkaul tpaytwan drunanmlahang Kosovo, Hasim Taci daw wada psdhu phiyu Kosovo Mincu Tang. Pnuda mccbu mi wada knbsyaqan kngkawas muda mbiyax muda meysa daw, Hasim Taci na mnKosovo seyhu pa hiti balay daw wada mniq kngkawas 2008 idas 2 diyax 17 mdhu balay pkla kari ptalax Serbia dukuricu, dukuricu dhuq saya wada srwanan knkana qnlhangan Omong mi ssiyaw qnlhangan Albania ka smruwa uri. Kngkawas 2007 Kosowo Gikay seyngkyo (2007ŚĻīÁßĎÁīĘś≤ÉŤ≠įśúÉťĀłŤąČ) Mniq kngkawas 2007 idas 11 diyax 17 muda kcka Kngkawas 2007 Kosovo Gikay Seyngkyo cida, wada mangal 35% hyo niya ka hantay Tang Kosovo Mincu Tang dndulan dmudul Hasim Taci, smatang musa mniq gikay tu1 knbeyhing Tang, kiya mi ccngtang Kosovo Mincu Ryeynmong u wana balay 22% ka mnnangal dha hyo. Hasim Taci qulung balay mptuhuy Kosovo Mincu Ryeynmong mpsupu muda pssli ryeynho seyhu, kiya mi Hasim Taci u muda mpcongri nbabaw niya ka hiya. Kiya mi mtbiyax balay dukuricu ka Hasim Taci u wada pusa kari, qulung phyuwan congri ka hiya pa, nasi Amirika, Russia mi O Co Ryeymong ka nmdudul uuda Kosovo pprngawan u ini dhqi psbalay, hiya u mpniq nhdanan diyax idas 12 diyax 10 daw, kasi uuda pkla kari dukuricu. Kngkawas 2008 idas 1 diyax 8, Hasim Taci pa balay bay muda tumal pnsung seyngkyo Kosovo Congri. Hasim Taci u 85 hyo mi 22 hyo wada mbiyax ka Hasim Taci, wada mbiyax mangal Kosovo burah Congri ka Hasim Taci, idas 1 diyax 9, Hasim Taci balay bay muda qmpah Congri Kosovo. Pkla kari dukuricu Mniq diyax tndxral hiya kngkawas 2008 idas 2 diyax 17 babaw cka hidaw 3 ji, Hasim Taci u mniq Kosovo Gikay dmudul kcka tukubeycu kaygi cida Kari Dukuricu Kosovo". Pnkla kari niyi u pkla Kosovo ka 'Mincu, Mbabaw Dxral, Kiya mi Knou Kluwanan Minjoku' na qnlhangan, kiya mi muda smdhu kari kasi ka muda knkana tblayaq smmalu phiyu malu pnluban tuhuy ssiyaw qnlhangan Serbia uri, muda snrnu Serbia u 'Mnrbuq Mi Kndux Ka Rikisi, Qqpahan Smbari, Ppwaluk Syakay' kiya u musa mbiyax balay lmutuc pkrana pnluban dha niyi. Babaw niya daw Gikay u muda pyawcwey, babaw cka hidaw 3ji 49pung ka wada muda "Pnkla Kari Dukuricu Kosovo"; hiti dawmniq 3ji 53pung knkana kwohuy giying u uka pnrngawan wada mnhdu psdhuq matas "Pnkla Kari Dukuricu Kosovo". Hasim Taci u u wada nanaq mdhu balay babaw dukuricu Kosovo daw mwaya balay Congri Kosovo. Kngkawas 2008 idas 6 diyax 6, 1 cuko dmuwi puniq meycu cnbu Prishtina Sosyang kwanti, smatang phuqil Hasim Taci mi ini pndungus. Kngkawas 2011 idas 2 diyax 22, Hasim Taci u wada mbiyax mangal Congri Kosovo dungan. Kngkawas 2016 idas 4 diyax 7 Hasim Taci pa wada psdhuwan phiyu Soto Kosovo. Kngkawas 2020 idas 6 diyax 24, congpu u wa mniq Netherlands Hague na Kwoci Tukubeycu Pankongs pkla kari kokosyo dHasim Keysakuwan Taci mi tnhiqan niya, Kwoci Tukubeycu Keysakuwan Pankongs u tmiyu dsediq niyi pa mniq kngkawas 1998 dhuq 1999 iyax cida snquri Serbia joku, sediq Romu, Kosovo llutuc Albania seyji ini pntna qnita niya u muda mqnaqah cumi mccbu mi cumi smliq pnwaya sediq, wada muda dalih 100ka ndanan dha pphuqil sediq. Idas 11 diyax 5, Hasim Taci u malix qpahun niya Soto Kosovo.
S.PHON: = ńßasńßim tńßa*i = mntu ¶iŇč ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax ** ka ńßasńßim tńßa*i ga, …ômpklaw ka ńßija. bukuŇč klwaan koso*o ta sajaŇč o kija ka ńßasńßim tńßa*i, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax * pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. = ńßasimi ta ¶i = ńßasim ta ¶i (ka…ĺi albania: ńßasńßim tńßa*i, ka…ĺi s…ô…ĺbia: ńßa*im ta*i, kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ***), koso*o s…ô…üi ¶ja, b…ĺańß soto koso*o, kija u…ĺi u ntumal b…ĺańß jugosla*ia koso*o duku…ĺi ¶u undo nija. kija ka koso*o duku…ĺi ¶u na bukuŇč koso*o min ¶u taŇč mi s…ôdiq albania dmudul na b…ĺańß koso*o ńß…ôtaj pnltadan mpdudul nija. ńßasim ta ¶i u mniq kŇčkkawas **** pn…ĺdiŇčan u mnujas pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč p…ĺisńßtina ¶ida, kija ka ńßantaj s…ô…ĺbia ¶oŇčjaŇč s…ôńßu na ¶i ¶in laqi mujas. ńßasim ta ¶i u mniq kŇčkawas **** tumal mniq swit*…ô…ĺland *u…ĺi ¶ na koso*o llutu ¶ albania s…ô…üi undo, kija mi pssli koso*o ńß…ôdjtaj pnltadan, dmudul spuda bijax m ¶bu m…ôsa duku…ĺi ¶u koso*o. bukuj daw ini dńßuq * kŇčkawas ka k ¶ka dijax wada qmlańßaŇč tuńßuna ¶ s…ô…ĺbia ńßba…ĺaw s…ôdiq albania ka mnou sŇč */* dx…ĺal nija nniqan. kŇčkawas **** idas *, p…ĺisńßtina ¶ida, p…ĺisńßtina (sotu koso*o saja) tińßwaŇč ńßojiŇč ini dńßuq muda p ¶ańßu ńßasim ta ¶i niqan spŇčan pn ¶ńßuwan ** knkawas, tnjuwan ¶umi ka 'muda dmudul smi ¶u ¶uji', kija daw spuda s…ô…ĺbia ka tnpusu tuńßuna ¶ …ĺj…ônmoŇč ńß…ôtaj mi k…ôsa ¶u mu…ĺu pn…ĺŇčawan knkana lnliŇčaj qnlńßaŇčan qm …ĺaq ńßasim ta ¶i. babaw nija daw ńßasim ta ¶i dmudul kosowo ńß…ôtaj pnltada tnumal kŇčkawas **** na m ¶ ¶bu koso*o. mnńßdu m ¶ ¶bu daw un u snkaul tpajtwan d…ĺunanmlańßaŇč koso*o, ńßasim ta ¶i daw wada psdńßu pńßiju koso*o min ¶u taŇč. pnuda m ¶ ¶bu mi wada knbsjaqan kŇčkawas muda mbijax muda m…ôsa daw, ńßasim ta ¶i na mnkoso*o s…ôńßu pa ńßiti balaj daw wada mniq kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** mdńßu balaj pkla ka…ĺi ptalax s…ô…ĺbia duku…ĺi ¶u, duku…ĺi ¶u dńßuq saja wada s…ĺwanan knkana qnlńßaŇčan omoŇč mi ssijaw qnlńßaŇčan albania ka sm…ĺuwa u…ĺi. kŇčkawas **** kosowo gikaj s…ôŇčkjo (************) mniq kŇčkawas **** idas ** dijax ** muda k ¶ka kŇčkawas **** koso*o gikaj s…ôŇčkjo ¶ida, wada maŇčal **% ńßjo nija ka ńßantaj taŇč koso*o min ¶u taŇč dndulan dmudul ńßasim ta ¶i, smataŇč musa mniq gikaj tu* knb…ôńßiŇč taŇč, kija mi ¶ ¶ŇčtaŇč koso*o min ¶u …ĺj…ônmoŇč u wana balaj **% ka mnnaŇčal dńßa ńßjo. ńßasim ta ¶i quluŇč balaj mptuńßuj koso*o min ¶u …ĺj…ônmoŇč mpsupu muda pssli …ĺj…ônńßo s…ôńßu, kija mi ńßasim ta ¶i u muda mp ¶oŇč…ĺi nbabaw nija ka ńßija. kija mi mtbijax balaj duku…ĺi ¶u ka ńßasim ta ¶i u wada pusa ka…ĺi, quluŇč pńßjuwan ¶oŇč…ĺi ka ńßija pa, nasi ami…ĺika, …ĺussia mi o ¶o …ĺj…ômoŇč ka nmdudul uuda koso*o pp…ĺŇčawan u ini dńßqi psbalaj, ńßija u mpniq nńßdanan dijax idas ** dijax ** daw, kasi uuda pkla ka…ĺi duku…ĺi ¶u. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax *, ńßasim ta ¶i pa balaj baj muda tumal pnsuŇč s…ôŇčkjo koso*o ¶oŇč…ĺi. ńßasim ta ¶i u ** ńßjo mi ** ńßjo wada mbijax ka ńßasim ta ¶i, wada mbijax maŇčal koso*o bu…ĺańß ¶oŇč…ĺi ka ńßasim ta ¶i, idas * dijax *, ńßasim ta ¶i balaj baj muda qmpańß ¶oŇč…ĺi koso*o. pkla ka…ĺi duku…ĺi ¶u mniq dijax tndx…ĺal ńßija kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** babaw ¶ka ńßidaw * …üi, ńßasim ta ¶i u mniq koso*o gikaj dmudul k ¶ka tukub…ô ¶u kajgi ¶ida ka…ĺi duku…ĺi ¶u koso*o". pnkla ka…ĺi niji u pkla koso*o ka 'min ¶u, mbabaw dx…ĺal, kija mi knou kluwanan min…üoku' na qnlńßaŇčan, kija mi muda smdńßu ka…ĺi kasi ka muda knkana tblajaq smmalu pńßiju malu pnluban tuńßuj ssijaw qnlńßaŇčan s…ô…ĺbia u…ĺi, muda sn…ĺnu s…ô…ĺbia u 'mn…ĺbuq mi kndux ka …ĺikisi, qqpańßan smba…ĺi, ppwaluk sjakaj' kija u musa mbijax balaj lmutu ¶ pk…ĺana pnluban dńßa niji. babaw nija daw gikaj u muda pjaw ¶w…ô, babaw ¶ka ńßidaw *…üi **puŇč ka wada muda "pnkla ka…ĺi duku…ĺi ¶u koso*o"; ńßiti dawmniq *…üi **puŇč knkana kwońßuj gijiŇč u uka pn…ĺŇčawan wada mnńßdu psdńßuq matas "pnkla ka…ĺi duku…ĺi ¶u koso*o". ńßasim ta ¶i u u wada nanaq mdńßu balaj babaw duku…ĺi ¶u koso*o daw mwaja balaj ¶oŇč…ĺi koso*o. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax *, * ¶uko dmuwi puniq m…ô ¶u ¶nbu p…ĺisńßtina sosjaŇč kwanti, smataŇč pńßuqil ńßasim ta ¶i mi ini pnduŇčus. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **, ńßasim ta ¶i u wada mbijax maŇčal ¶oŇč…ĺi koso*o duŇčan. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax * ńßasim ta ¶i pa wada psdńßuwan pńßiju soto koso*o. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **, ¶oŇčpu u wa mniq n…ôtńß…ô…ĺlands ńßagu…ô na kwo ¶i tukub…ô ¶u pankoŇčs pkla ka…ĺi kokosjo dńßasim k…ôsakuwan ta ¶i mi tnńßiqan nija, kwo ¶i tukub…ô ¶u k…ôsakuwan pankoŇčs u tmiju ds…ôdiq niji pa mniq kŇčkawas **** dńßuq **** ijax ¶ida snqu…ĺi s…ô…ĺbia …üoku, s…ôdiq …ĺomu, koso*o llutu ¶ albania s…ô…üi ini pntna qnita nija u muda mqnaqańß ¶umi m ¶ ¶bu mi ¶umi smliq pnwaja s…ôdiq, wada muda dalińß ***ka ndanan dńßa ppńßuqil s…ôdiq. idas ** dijax *, ńßasim ta ¶i u malix qpańßun nija soto koso*o.
S.FORM: = Hashim Tha√ßi = Mntucing hngkawas 1968 idas 4 jiyax 24 ka Hashim Tha√ßi ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Kosovo ta sayang o kiya ka Hashim Tha√ßi, pnaah hngkawas 2016 idas 4 jiyax 7 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. = Hasimi Taci = Hasim Taci (Kari Albania: Hashim Tha√ßi, kari Serbia: HaŇ°im Tańći, kngkawas 1968 idas 4 diyax 24Ôľć), Kosovo seyjicya, brah soto Kosovo, kiya uri u ntumal brah Yugoslavia Kosovo Dukuricu Undo niya. Kiya ka Kosovo dukuricu na Bukung Kosovo Mincu Tang mi sediq Albania dmudul na brah Kosovo Heytay Pnltadan mpdudul niya. Hasim Taci u mniq kngkkawas 1990 pnrdingan u mnuyas Pyasan Tubeyhing Prishtina cida, kiya ka hantay Serbia Congyang Seyhu na cicin laqi muyas. Hasim Taci u mniq kngkawas 1993 tumal mniq Switzerland Zuric na Kosovo llutuc Albania seyji undo, kiya mi pssli Kosovo Hedytay Pnltadan, dmudul spuda biyax mcbu meysa dukuricu Kosovo. Bukuy daw ini dhuq 1 kngkawas ka kcka diyax wada qmlahang tuhunac Serbia hbaraw sediq Albania ka mnou Sng 1/4 dxral niya nniqan. Kngkawas 1997 idas 7, Prishtina cida, Prishtina (Sotu Kosovo saya) tihwang hoying ini dhuq muda pcahu Hasim Taci niqan spngan pnchuwan 10 knkawas, tnyuwan cumi ka 'Muda Dmudul Smicu Cuyi', kiya daw spuda Serbia ka tnpusu Tuhunac Ryeynmong heytay mi keysacu muru pnrngawan knkana lnlingay qnlhangan qm raq Hasim Taci. Babaw niya daw Hasim Taci dmudul Kosowo Heytay Pnltada tnumal kngkawas 1999 na Mccbu Kosovo. Mnhdu mccbu daw UN u snkaul tpaytwan drunanmlahang Kosovo, Hasim Taci daw wada psdhu phiyu Kosovo Mincu Tang. Pnuda mccbu mi wada knbsyaqan kngkawas muda mbiyax muda meysa daw, Hasim Taci na mnKosovo seyhu pa hiti balay daw wada mniq kngkawas 2008 idas 2 diyax 17 mdhu balay pkla kari ptalax Serbia dukuricu, dukuricu dhuq saya wada srwanan knkana qnlhangan Omong mi ssiyaw qnlhangan Albania ka smruwa uri. Kngkawas 2007 Kosowo Gikay seyngkyo (2007ŚĻīÁßĎÁīĘś≤ÉŤ≠įśúÉťĀłŤąČ) Mniq kngkawas 2007 idas 11 diyax 17 muda kcka Kngkawas 2007 Kosovo Gikay Seyngkyo cida, wada mangal 35% hyo niya ka hantay Tang Kosovo Mincu Tang dndulan dmudul Hasim Taci, smatang musa mniq gikay tu1 knbeyhing Tang, kiya mi ccngtang Kosovo Mincu Ryeynmong u wana balay 22% ka mnnangal dha hyo. Hasim Taci qulung balay mptuhuy Kosovo Mincu Ryeynmong mpsupu muda pssli ryeynho seyhu, kiya mi Hasim Taci u muda mpcongri nbabaw niya ka hiya. Kiya mi mtbiyax balay dukuricu ka Hasim Taci u wada pusa kari, qulung phyuwan congri ka hiya pa, nasi Amirika, Russia mi O Co Ryeymong ka nmdudul uuda Kosovo pprngawan u ini dhqi psbalay, hiya u mpniq nhdanan diyax idas 12 diyax 10 daw, kasi uuda pkla kari dukuricu. Kngkawas 2008 idas 1 diyax 8, Hasim Taci pa balay bay muda tumal pnsung seyngkyo Kosovo Congri. Hasim Taci u 85 hyo mi 22 hyo wada mbiyax ka Hasim Taci, wada mbiyax mangal Kosovo burah Congri ka Hasim Taci, idas 1 diyax 9, Hasim Taci balay bay muda qmpah Congri Kosovo. Pkla kari dukuricu Mniq diyax tndxral hiya kngkawas 2008 idas 2 diyax 17 babaw cka hidaw 3 ji, Hasim Taci u mniq Kosovo Gikay dmudul kcka tukubeycu kaygi cida Kari Dukuricu Kosovo". Pnkla kari niyi u pkla Kosovo ka 'Mincu, Mbabaw Dxral, Kiya mi Knou Kluwanan Minjoku' na qnlhangan, kiya mi muda smdhu kari kasi ka muda knkana tblayaq smmalu phiyu malu pnluban tuhuy ssiyaw qnlhangan Serbia uri, muda snrnu Serbia u 'Mnrbuq Mi Kndux Ka Rikisi, Qqpahan Smbari, Ppwaluk Syakay' kiya u musa mbiyax balay lmutuc pkrana pnluban dha niyi. Babaw niya daw Gikay u muda pyawcwey, babaw cka hidaw 3ji 49pung ka wada muda "Pnkla Kari Dukuricu Kosovo"; hiti dawmniq 3ji 53pung knkana kwohuy giying u uka pnrngawan wada mnhdu psdhuq matas "Pnkla Kari Dukuricu Kosovo". Hasim Taci u u wada nanaq mdhu balay babaw dukuricu Kosovo daw mwaya balay Congri Kosovo. Kngkawas 2008 idas 6 diyax 6, 1 cuko dmuwi puniq meycu cnbu Prishtina Sosyang kwanti, smatang phuqil Hasim Taci mi ini pndungus. Kngkawas 2011 idas 2 diyax 22, Hasim Taci u wada mbiyax mangal Congri Kosovo dungan. Kngkawas 2016 idas 4 diyax 7 Hasim Taci pa wada psdhuwan phiyu Soto Kosovo. Kngkawas 2020 idas 6 diyax 24, congpu u wa mniq Netherlands Hague na Kwoci Tukubeycu Pankongs pkla kari kokosyo dHasim Keysakuwan Taci mi tnhiqan niya, Kwoci Tukubeycu Keysakuwan Pankongs u tmiyu dsediq niyi pa mniq kngkawas 1998 dhuq 1999 iyax cida snquri Serbia joku, sediq Romu, Kosovo llutuc Albania seyji ini pntna qnita niya u muda mqnaqah cumi mccbu mi cumi smliq pnwaya sediq, wada muda dalih 100ka ndanan dha pphuqil sediq. Idas 11 diyax 5, Hasim Taci u malix qpahun niya Soto Kosovo.

koso*o, ńßasim ta ¶i daw wada psdńßu pńßiju koso*o min ¶u taŇč. pnuda m ¶ ¶bu mi wada knbsjaqan kŇčkawas muda mbijax muda m…ôsa daw, ńßasim ta ¶i na mnkoso*o s…ôńßu pa ńßiti balaj daw wada mniq kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** mdńßu balaj pkla ka…ĺi ptalax s…ô…ĺbia duku…ĺi ¶u, duku…ĺi ¶u dńßuq saja wada s…ĺwanan knkana qnlńßaŇčan omoŇč mi ssijaw qnlńßaŇčan albania ka sm…ĺuwa u…ĺi. kŇčkawas ****
